name: Mariam Mohamed Elwakel

projects.name: AI Interviewer & ATS Screening System
projects.description: Built an AI-powered Applicant Tracking System (ATS) to evaluate CVs against job descriptions and score candidates based on matched skills and missing requirements.

projects.name: AI Chatbot for Medical Diagnosis
projects.description: Contributed to the design and development of an AI medical chatbot by fine-tuning a large language model on a real medical dataset.

projects.name: Tetris AI Game with Genetic Algorithm
projects.description: Implemented an AI agent using a genetic algorithm to play Tetris.

summary: AI Engineer with hands-on experience designing, training, and deploying machine learning, computer vision, and NLP solutions.
